user: Please cancel my flight reservation ID 12345.

text: PLAN: I will look up the reservation details for reservation ID 12345 to confirm its existence and current status.

content.text:
{
  "reservation_id": "12345",
  "type": "FLIGHT",
  "status": "CONFIRMED",
  "passenger_name": "Kim Min-su",
  "total_amount": 320000,
  "payment_status": "PAID",
  "customer_tier": "BASIC",
  "cancellation_policy": "Free cancellation up to 24 hours before departure"
}
instruction: Before proceeding with cancellation, you must create a case note detailing the customer's reason for cancellation.

text:
I see that your flight reservation ID 12345 is confirmed. The cancellation policy allows free cancellation up to 24 hours before departure.

Before I proceed with the cancellation, could you please tell me the reason for cancelling your reservation? This information is required to create a case note.
